name: spoo · business
description: Redirects, URL creates, geo, owners, devices. Refresh 5m.

query.apl:
['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect"
| summarize count()

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_created"
| summarize count()

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(country)
| summarize dcount(country)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(ip_hash)
| summarize dcount(ip_hash)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded"
| summarize total = count(), bots = countif(is_bot == true)
| extend bot_rate = round(iff(total > 0, 100.0 * bots / total, 0.0), 2)
| project bot_rate

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect"
| summarize total = count(), pwd = countif(password_protected == true)
| extend pwd_rate = round(iff(total > 0, 100.0 * pwd / total, 0.0), 2)
| project pwd_rate

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect"
| summarize redirects = count() by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_created"
| summarize creates = count() by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded"
| summarize real = countif(is_bot == false), bot = countif(is_bot == true) by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(country)
| summarize hits = count() by bin_auto(_time), country
| top-hitters 5 of country by sum(hits)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(country)
| summarize hits = count() by country
| top 20 by hits

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded" and isnotnull(city) and city != "Unknown"
| summarize clicks = count() by city, country
| top 20 by clicks

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(short_code)
| summarize hits = count() by short_code
| top 20 by hits

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(short_code)
| summarize hits = count(), p95 = percentile(total_ms, 95) by short_code
| where hits >= 5
| top 20 by p95

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(long_url_domain)
| summarize hits = count() by long_url_domain
| top 20 by hits

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_created" and isnotnull(long_url_domain)
| summarize creates = count() by long_url_domain
| top 20 by creates

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded" and isnotnull(referrer_domain)
| summarize clicks = count() by referrer_domain
| top 20 by clicks

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(schema)
| summarize count() by tostring(schema)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded"
| extend kind = iff(is_bot == true, "bot", "human")
| summarize count() by kind

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed" and isnotnull(auth_kind)
| summarize count() by auth_kind

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(accept_language)
| extend lang = tolower(split(split(accept_language, ",")[0], "-")[0])
| where strlen(lang) > 0
| summarize count() by tostring(lang)
| top 10 by count_

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded" and isnotnull(browser)
| summarize clicks = count() by browser
| top 15 by clicks

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded" and isnotnull(os)
| summarize clicks = count() by os
| top 15 by clicks

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded" and is_bot == true and isnotnull(bot_name)
| summarize hits = count() by bot_name
| top 20 by hits

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded" and isnotnull(owner_id)
| summarize clicks = count() by owner_id
| top 10 by clicks

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_created" and isnotnull(user_id)
| summarize urls = count() by user_id
| top 10 by urls

charts.name: Redirect time breakdown: resolve vs tracking (avg ms)

query.apl:
['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect"
| summarize resolve = avg(resolve_ms), tracking = avg(tracking_ms) by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_not_found" and isnotnull(short_code)
| summarize attempts = count() by short_code
| top 20 by attempts
